sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29810" key="dwri/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δωρίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ] ἀγών, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, game <sense id="n29810.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in which the conqueror received a present</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.820d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
